title: Design System: ระบบข้อมูลสุขภาพ สตูล

product.northStar: โต๊ะบัญชาการข้อมูลจังหวัด
product.audience: เจ้าหน้าที่สาธารณสุขทั้งจังหวัดสตูล
personality: เชื่อถือได้
antiReferences: เว็บราชการเก่า
หน้าตาซับซ้อนจนต้องเดาวิธีใช้งาน
สีจัดหรือองค์ประกอบตกแต่งที่แย่งความสนใจจากข้อมูล
ลวดลายแฟนซีที่ทำให้ระบบดูไม่น่าเชื่อถือ

rules: Use red only for danger, delete, and error.
Use amber only for warning or pending.
Use emerald only for success, active, ready, or health-positive states.
Keep each module to one main accent family plus neutral surfaces.
Do not scale font size with viewport width.
Keep letter spacing at 0 unless a local uppercase label already requires tracking.
Use weight and hierarchy to guide scanning, not oversized type.
Prefer stable dimensions for icon buttons, badges, segmented controls, table cells, and toolbars.
Use tighter spacing for dense tables and forms than for overview dashboard panels.

elevation.philosophy: Hybrid tonal layering: borders and muted surfaces first, shadows only for hierarchy, overlay, and interaction.

rules: Use motion for feedback only: hover, menu open, modal entry, loading, and splash.
Avoid decorative motion inside data-heavy admin screens.
Respect reduced motion when adding new animation.

buttons.primary: sky background or sky gradient, white text, semibold, icon plus label when possible
buttons.destructive: red background or red-tinted surface, clear delete copy
buttons.iconOnly: fixed 28px to 40px square with lucide icon and title or accessible label

navigation.mobile: large touch targets with icon and label

rules: Mobile layouts must not rely on wide tables without overflow handling.
Modals should fit within 90vh and keep header and actions reachable.
Long Thai labels must wrap or truncate intentionally without overlapping controls.

accessibility.target: WCAG AA for critical text and controls
rules: Do not communicate status by color alone.
Keep touch targets usable on mobile.
Use visible focus treatment on interactive controls.
Write Thai error messages with specific recovery guidance.
